title: Odume Festus and Iyke Malachy Ndubuzor Discuss Digital PR Strategies at Lagos Event - FinancialEDGE
description: The 10th edition of the Nigeria Digital Public Relations Summit with the theme, "Digital PR in Action: Owning Your Narratives, Telling Your Story," brought together industry experts to discuss effective digital PR strategies. The summit provided a platform for professionals to share best practices and experiences on narrative ownership and storytelling in the digital age.
html:
The 10th edition of the Nigeria Digital Public Relations Summit with the theme, “Digital PR in Action: Owning Your Narratives, Telling Your Story,” brought together industry experts to discuss effective digital PR strategies.

The summit provided a platform for professionals to share best practices and experiences on narrative ownership and storytelling in the digital age.

Representatives from Financial Edge and G. CAPPA Plc engaged with peers, exploring innovative approaches to digital public relations.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial  / Project Director Financial Edge and Iyke Malachy Ndubuzor, Corporate Service Department G. CAPPA Plc at the Nigeria Public Relations Summit in Lagos.
